summary: Matched two remaining decomp targets across fighter and stage code: ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby_IASA in ftCommon/Kirby capture logic and grGreens_80214B58 in Green Greens stage logic. The decomp.dev report recorded 2 new matches, +1644 matched bytes, with ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby_IASA moving from 63.61% to 100.00% and grGreens_80214B58 from 99.26% to 100.00%. Discussion noted that CaptureWaitKirby shares strings with thrownkirby, and reviewer guidance was that shared strings require the units to be merged.

key_files.role: Matched CaptureWaitKirby IASA behavior with helper-call reshaping, local variable/codegen adjustments, scale source correction, and include/static-data cleanup.
Matched grGreens_80214B58 by reshaping bomb RNG assignment and array zero-initialization code.

what_changed: Removed unused placeholder/platform/types/ftanim/throw/baselib includes and removed local static float/double constants from ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c.
Added ftCo_800BD6EC_noinline as a wrapper that calls ftCo_800BD6EC, then used it inside ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby_IASA.

Changed inlineB0 to compute a signed s32 value of -1 or 1 from lstick.x and pass that to ftKb_SpecialN_800F5A04, instead of only calling the helper on negative input with the absolute stick magnitude.
Changed ftKb_SpecialN_800F5A38 call in ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby_IASA to pass gobj->user_data rather than the cached Fighter* fp.
Changed CaptureWaitKirby scale restoration to call HSD_JObjSetScale with fp->mv.co.capturekirby.scale instead of jobj->scale.
In grgreens.c, collapsed BOMB's local c/r temporaries into a direct ternary assignment using grGr_params->x20 and HSD_Randi.
Changed grGreens_80214B58 zeroing from a single i < 0x20 loop to an i < 24 loop plus explicit stores for grGr_8049F9E0[0x18] through [0x1D].
smart_moves: Used a noinline wrapper around ftCo_800BD6EC to preserve a separate call shape without changing the underlying helper's behavior.
Introduced small local-variable and typing changes, including s32 value, s32 pad, and 0.0f comparison, to guide register/stack allocation toward the target assembly.
Preserved semantic zeroing in grGreens_80214B58 while splitting the stores into a loop plus explicit assignments, a common tactic when the original compiler did not emit the simplest loop form.
Removed unnecessary includes and static constants after the match no longer needed placeholder data, reducing noise in the decompiled source.
decomp_lessons: For matching, a semantically equivalent helper call may still need a wrapper or call-order change to reproduce the original codegen.
When a function uses object user data, using gobj->user_data directly can differ from reusing a typed local pointer even if they refer to the same data.
Array clearing code should be matched to the emitted store pattern, not just the high-level intent; a shorter loop plus explicit stores may match where a wider loop does not.
Shared strings or shared rodata across apparent units can force translation units to be merged; the PR discussion explicitly says shared strings with thrownkirby mean they have to be merged.
Do not keep placeholder constants/includes once actual data/code shape is known, unless they are still required for rodata matching.
naming_conventions: ftCo_* prefix for ftCommon fighter functions, e.g. ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby_IASA and ftCo_800BD6EC.
ftKb_SpecialN_* prefix for Kirby neutral-special helper functions used by CaptureWaitKirby.
grGreens_* prefix for Green Greens stage functions, e.g. grGreens_80214B58.
Address-suffixed names such as ftCo_800BD6EC and grGreens_80214B58 are retained for not-yet-renamed decomp symbols.
A local wrapper was named with a _noinline suffix: ftCo_800BD6EC_noinline.
BOMB is an all-caps static inline helper local to grgreens.c.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added a noinline wrapper function to force a call boundary for ftCo_800BD6EC.
Added dummy/local variables such as s32 pad and s32 value to influence stack layout and register allocation.
Used an explicit float literal comparison, fp->input.lstick.x < 0.0f, in stick-direction code.
Passed an integer sign value to ftKb_SpecialN_800F5A04 to match the observed call convention/code shape.
Replaced local temporaries in BOMB with a nested ternary expression to alter generated code.
Split a 0x20-element clear loop into a 24-iteration loop plus explicit stores at indices 0x18 through 0x1D.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: If CaptureWaitKirby and thrownkirby share strings, then the units have to be merged.

follow_up_queries: Check whether CaptureWaitKirby and thrownkirby still share strings or rodata that should be handled by merging translation units.
Search for other ftCommon/Kirby capture functions where gobj->user_data versus cached Fighter* affects matching.
Look for other Green Greens initialization routines where array clears need to be split into loop-plus-explicit-store patterns.
Audit noinline wrapper usage around ftCo_800BD6EC-like helpers to see whether the same tactic applies to nearby unmatched functions.
